## Benchmark submission checklist

- [ ] I added exactly one YAML file under `benchmarks/` (or explained why not)
- [ ] All units are **sec / USD / GB**
- [ ] All numeric values are non-negative
- [ ] `id` is unique across all existing benchmarks
- [ ] I ran validation locally (`python -m sitegen validate`)
- [ ] `url` and `commit` are optional, but correct if provided
